Subsection.title: Overview
Subsection.Paragraph: The xstructural package provides a simple checker for type attributes. Given a file of type declarations, the checker will ensure that all type attributes that appear in a document refer to declared types. If a type attribute refers to a nonexistent type, the document will fail to validate.

FormalItem.title: Example
FormalItem.Verbatim: <Types xmlns="urn:com.io7m.structural.types:1:0"> <Type Name="package"> <Description xml:lang="en"> A name of a software package. </Description> <Description xml:lang="fr"> Le nom d'un logiciel de service. </Description> <Description xml:lang="de"> Ein Name eines Softwarepakets. </Description> </Type> </Types>

Subsection.title: Schema
Subsection.Paragraph: A type declaration file must conform to the following schema:
